tracks.meaning: an area of land used for growing crops or raising livestock
a region or area of the earth's surface with particular characteristics
the area of play in sports like cricket, soccer, or American football
a named variable or data structure that stores information in a database or program
to play or operate a sports position or role in a game or activity
a specialized area of military operations or a military base
a domain or specialty within medical science and healthcare
a particular industry, profession, or area of commercial activity
an area of study or specialization within psychological research and practice
a subject area or topic under discussion or study
an area of legal practice or jurisdiction
an area of academic or practical study and research
a region of space in which a force or influence exists, such as a magnetic or gravitational field
the area visible to an audience from the stage in a theater or performance space
the background or space upon which the primary subject is depicted
to catch or stop a ball in sports, especially baseball or cricket
